_comment: SWEF v1.0.0-rc1 — App Store (iOS) submission template. Fill in all fields before submitting to App Store Connect.

metadata.subtitle: Fly from your location to space

en-US.description:
Take off from your real-world GPS location and fly through stunning photorealistic 3D terrain powered by Google Photorealistic Tiles and Cesium for Unity.

Skywalking: Earth Flight lets you soar from your backyard to the edge of space — through troposphere, stratosphere, and the Kármán line — in a single seamless flight.

KEY FEATURES
• GPS-accurate takeoff from your real location
• Photorealistic 3D terrain via Google Maps Tiles (Cesium)
• ARIA AI Co-Pilot: smart flight advisor and emergency guide
• Dynamic weather: clouds, wind, storms, lightning
• Full 24-hour day/night cycle
• ATC radio communication and ILS approach
• Battle Pass with seasonal challenges and rewards
• Multiplayer formation flying and voice chat
• Photo Mode with drone camera and filters
• Achievement system with 100+ milestones
• PC, iOS, Android, iPad — play anywhere
en-US.releaseNotes:
Version 1.0.0 — Launch Release!
• All 100+ feature systems complete
• GPS-accurate takeoff
• ARIA AI Co-Pilot
• Battle Pass Season 1: Sky Pioneer
• Full multi-platform support

ja.description: あなたのGPS位置から宇宙の端まで飛ぼう。Googleフォトリアリスティック3DタイルとCesiumによる圧倒的なリアルな地球を、スカイウォーキング: アースフライトで体験してください。
ja.keywords: フライト,シミュレーター,GPS,地球,宇宙,Cesium,3D,パイロット,航空
ja.releaseNotes: バージョン1.0.0 — 正式リリース！

ko.description: 내 GPS 위치에서 우주 끝까지 날아가보세요. 스카이워킹: 어스 플라이트는 Google 포토리얼리스틱 3D 타일과 Cesium으로 구동되는 실사 3D 지형을 통해 지구 어디서든 이륙할 수 있는 비행 시뮬레이션입니다.

zh-Hans.description: 从您的GPS位置起飞，一路飞向太空边缘。天行者：地球飞行由谷歌逼真3D地图瓦片和Cesium驱动，让您体验真实3D地形上的完整飞行之旅。
zh-Hans.keywords: 飞行,模拟器,GPS,地球,太空,Cesium,3D,飞行员

infoPlistRequirements.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SWEF uses your location to start your flight from your real-world position using GPS.
infoPlistRequirements.NSCameraUsageDescription: SWEF accesses your camera to capture in-flight photos and support augmented reality features.
infoPlistRequirements.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SWEF accesses your microphone for voice commands and in-flight voice chat with other pilots.
infoPlistRequirements.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SWEF saves your in-flight photos to your photo library.
